events.title: The Eternal Circle's Retaliation
events.description: After their failed assault during Operation Fifth Starfall, the Eternal Circle is launching coordinated attacks across Millhaven. Fires have been set in the old warehouses near the docks, the merchant guild hall, and the temple district where families took shelter. The cult may be punishing the town or creating chaos to cover another objective.

events.title: Celestial Instability at Skyreach Peaks
events.description: The failure of Operation Fifth Starfall destabilized the celestial web. Fragments of starlight fall like rain near Skyreach Peaks, temporal distortions warp reality, and gravity behaves unpredictably. The boundary between mortal and celestial realms has grown dangerously thin.
